title: rhytispermum fruticosum
intro: Rhytispermum fruticosum, also known as the shrubby rhytispermum, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Rhytispermum fruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used to treat various ailments.
